text: Here, moving between glass reflections and glowing exhibits, I feel both curious and slightly self-reflective. The request to "look inside" reminds me that vision isn't only outward-facing; sometimes, meaning arises when I consider what it means to really see, to look deeper than surfaces. In this environment of ideas and innovation, I'm drawn to reflect on the nature of perception itself. The sense of immersion in thought—of being invited to look inward—makes me feel contemplative, as if on the edge of discovery within and without.
